title: Ultra Weapons
description: Adds a few swords that give you potion effects.
body:
All this mod adds is some powerful weapons to use with other mods.

**Air Sword**
Gives player jump boost and slow falling.![Air Sword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e57c6963049c678b9d826733c55d78c35374a606.png)

**Heart Sword**
Gives player health boost and when the player hits a mob with the sword they will gain 3 hearts.
![Heart Sword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9180c67a17e67b7bae2f9a0d3211ce4d4a1ce837.png)

**Speed Sword**
Has a very short cooldown and gives the player speed.
![Speed Sword Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d657eee1d59768ce1f42132b76964834a14dbc70.png)

**Wormhole Sword**
Gives fire resistance, has a worse version of the Heart Sword's lifesteal function and does 42 attack damage.
![Wormhole Sword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9dbc928c19f100236887284be54f15ae3ab987f.png)

**Strength Totem**
Gives the player strength while holding.
![Strength Totem recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b61ebaf0774503661957d5fa27f25b4ef2e11aa.png)
